allow: Bash(awk '{sum+=$1} END {print "Total FAQ answer words: " sum}')
Bash(awk '/slug:/{post=$0} /heading:/{if\(post ~ /emergency-fund/ || post ~ /wealth-building/ || post ~ /business-loan/\) print post, NR}')

Bash(awk '/slug: .how-to-calculate-emi/,/^  \\],/ {if\(/sections: \\[/\) {in_sections=1} else if\(in_sections && /heading:/\) {count++} else if\(in_sections && /faqs:/\) {print count " sections"; exit}}')

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Killing PID $_"; Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } else { Write-Output "Nothing on 3000" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output "freed 3000" } else { Write-Output "3000 already free" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output "freed 3000" } else { Write-Output "3000 free" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; "freed" } else { "free" })
